checks.reason: The node is scoped to early gunpowder artillery in the c. 1300-1650 gunpowder-revolution frame.
The node is scoped to the mid-15th-century shoulder-fired harquebus.
Gunpowder is the direct operating propellant for early gunpowder artillery.
The harquebus is a gunpowder firearm.
Broad construction is contextual, not a direct cannon prerequisite.
Early cannon were not universally dependent on blast-furnace cast iron.
The arquebus is not modeled as directly dependent on cannon technology.
